# VERIFY: #127 — Domain Memory: Module-Feature Taxonomy, Project Profiling, and Epic Management Rules
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | Revised v4 -->

**Intent:** Verify that all domain memory files are well-structured Markdown, semantically rich, properly organized with two-axis profiling, and discoverable by existing agent LTM search patterns.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 12 files exist at their expected paths under `core/components/memory/`
- [ ] All files are valid Markdown (`.md` extension)
- [ ] `knowledge/_index.md` contains entries for `domain-taxonomy/` and `project-profiling/`
- [ ] `standards/_index.md` contains entry for `agent-lifecycle/epic-management-rules.md`
- [ ] Each module taxonomy file defines at least 5 features
- [ ] Each feature has all 4 semantic sections: "When It Matters", "Depth Spectrum", "Signals", "Tradeoffs"
- [ ] No feature has `default_tier` or `profile_gates` — old model is not present
- [ ] `product-profile.md` defines exactly 7 dimensions (PP-1 through PP-7) with 5 levels each
- [ ] `nfr-profile.md` defines at least 7 dimensions (NFR-1 through NFR-7) with 5 levels each
- [ ] Each profile level has a label, description, and examples
- [ ] `product-profile.md` contains NFR guidance section
- [ ] No `selection-rules` file exists — rules engine eliminated
- [ ] `epic-management-rules.md` is at `standards/agent-lifecycle/` and contains all 7 rules
- [ ] Glob for `standards/**` returns `epic-management-rules.md`
- [ ] Glob for `knowledge/domain-taxonomy/**` returns 6 files (index + 5 modules)
- [ ] Glob for `knowledge/project-profiling/**` returns 3 files (index + 2 profiles)

## Verification Steps

| Step | Method | Expected Outcome |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| File existence: taxonomy | `ls knowledge/domain-taxonomy/` | 6 `.md` files |
| File existence: profiling | `ls knowledge/project-profiling/` | 3 `.md` files |
| File existence: epic rules | `ls standards/agent-lifecycle/` | 1 `.md` file |
| Feature sections | Grep each module file for "When It Matters", "Depth Spectrum", "Signals", "Tradeoffs" | All 4 headings present per feature |
| No old model | Grep all files for `default_tier`, `profile_gates`, `selection_rules` | Zero matches |
| Product profile dims | Grep `product-profile.md` for `PP-1` through `PP-7` | All 7 present |
| NFR profile dims | Grep `nfr-profile.md` for `NFR-1` through `NFR-7` | All 7 present |
| Level definitions | Grep each profile for "Level 1" through "Level 5" per dimension | 5 levels per dimension |
| NFR guidance | Grep `product-profile.md` for "NFR" or "nfr_guidance" | Guidance section exists |
| No selection rules | `ls knowledge/project-profiling/selection-rules*` | Not found |
| Epic rules headings | Grep `epic-management-rules.md` for all 7 rule names | All 7 present |
| Knowledge index | Grep `knowledge/_index.md` for "domain-taxonomy" and "project-profiling" | Both match |
| Standards index | Grep `standards/_index.md` for "agent-lifecycle" | Match |

## Edge Cases

| Scenario | Expected Behavior |
|----------|------------------|
| Agent searches for "authentication", "login" | Module file content matches — user-management.md mentions these in features |
| Agent has both profiles, reads a feature | Agent reasons over "When It Matters" + "Signals" with profile values as context |
| Feature relevant at different depths for different profiles | Agent reads "Depth Spectrum" and selects appropriate depth |
| New module added later | Create new `.md` + update `_index.md` — no other changes |
| New NFR dimension added | Add section to `nfr-profile.md` — extensible, no structural changes |
| BRD for industry not in any module | Agent reasons with general knowledge + whatever modules partially apply |
| PP-6 (Delivery) = 1 (POC) | Agent reads features' "Tradeoffs" and defers non-essential features |
